Center: Center of Nuclear Physics Data, Russian Federal Nuclear Center (VNIIEF), Sarov, Russia
ref: Jour: Helvetica Physica Acta, Vol.36, p.465 (1963)
title: 6Li(d,p)7Li and 6Li(d,alpha)alpha reactions at the deuteron energy range 3 - 5 MeV

x4codes.shortRef: Jour: Helvetica Physica Acta, Vol.36, p.465 (1963)

x4freetext: The Li-6 was evaporated onto a
self-supporting Mowital F40 foil with a thickness of
approximately 7 ug/cm2 as a target carrier.
The thickness of the metal layer was determined
from its stopping power against alpha, He3,and d

flag.hlp: Reference to related data compiled in another entry

x4freetext: comparison purposes, the cross section of the
reaction Li6(p,alpha)He3 (60 degr., Ep=1 MeV) was
also measured in the way described in METHOD. It agrees
within error with the data given by Marion, et al.
The cross sections were determined absolutely to
within 20% according to the method of thickness
CNPD: corrected 4-dig. year and lower cases.
